name: Mobile render-performance pass: memoize/virtualize lists + stabilize callbacks
description: Umbrella (consolidation 2026-06-24) for the FCR-2026-06-21 L7 mobile render-performance findings — absorbs WI-965/968/969/970/971. Each is an independent React.memo/useMemo/virtualization/identity-stability fix; perf only, no behavior change.
acceptanceCriteria:
Behavior-preserving mobile render-perf fixes; no UI/testID/navigation change. Each site: cd apps/mobile && pnpm exec jest --findRelatedTests <file> --no-coverage green; existing tests pass; honor co-located tests + exhaustive react-hooks deps (no eslint-disable). Sites:
1) TopicStatusRow list (book detail) — all rows mounted via nested map in ScrollView, inline onPress, style IIFEs per render; React.memo + useMemo styles + stable onPress + FlatList/SectionList.
2) SessionMessageActions — re-renders for every message on any chat-state change (sibling MessageBubble already memoized); React.memo w/ comparator + useCallback handlers; preserve reconnect/quota/chip/feedback/bookmark/streaming/stage gating.
3) ShelfRow (library+search lists) — per-render tint/status/progress/date math; React.memo + useMemo derived values; preserve a11y labels + chips.

4) FlatLists missing getItemLayout (8 fixed-height sites incl. progress/milestones.tsx) — add getItemLayout or document variable-height; record the 8-site inventory in the summary.
5) LibrarySearchResults rows — five sections render every match unvirtualized, formatSearchDate inline; memoize rows + precompute dates + SectionList; preserve headers/testIDs/callbacks.
6) Hook return identity (use-challenge-round.ts:110-129 [5 inline arrows], use-all-books.ts:93-99, use-api-reachability.ts:104) — return-object recreated each render; useCallback the arrows + useMemo the return over real deps; add render-stability test (renderHook rerender identical inputs, assert Object.is on object + callbacks).
Absorbs WI-965/968/969/970/971 (closed Duplicate 2026-06-24).
